channel.title: GitHub Elixir Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Elixir in GitHub

item.title: wojtekmach/elixir-run
item.description: Erlang/OTP + Elixir + IEx + Mix in a single executable for Linux/macOS/Windows. Just run Elixir!

item.title: supabase/realtime
item.description: Listen to your to PostgreSQL database in realtime via websockets. Built with Elixir.

item.title: elixir-ecto/ecto
item.description: A toolkit for data mapping and language integrated query.

item.title: absinthe-graphql/absinthe
item.description: The GraphQL toolkit for Elixir

item.title: plausible/analytics
item.description: Simple, open-source, lightweight (< 1 KB) and privacy-friendly web analytics alternative to Google Analytics.

item.title: code-corps/stripity_stripe
item.description: An Elixir Library for Stripe

item.title: elixir-nx/livebook
item.description: Interactive and collaborative code notebooks - made with Phoenix LiveView

item.title: blockscout/blockscout
item.description: Blockchain explorer for Ethereum based network and a tool for inspecting and analyzing EVM based blockchains.

item.title: sorentwo/oban
item.description: 💎 Robust job processing in Elixir, backed by modern PostgreSQL

item.title: adriankumpf/teslamate
item.description: A self-hosted data logger for your Tesla 🚘

item.title: evadne/etso
item.description: Ecto 3 adapter allowing use of Ecto schemas held in ETS tables

item.title: ZennerIoT/ex_audit
item.description: Ecto auditing library that transparently tracks changes and can revert them.

item.title: opentelemetry-beam/opentelemetry_ecto
item.description: Trace Ecto queries with OpenTelemetry

item.title: elixir-wallaby/wallaby
item.description: Concurrent browser tests with elixir

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix_live_view
item.description: Rich, real-time user experiences with server-rendered HTML

item.title: Cogility/fusion_auth
item.description: The fusion_auth library provides an Elixir API for accessing the FusionAuth Developer APIs.

item.title: kafkaex/kafka_ex
item.description: Kafka client library for Elixir

item.title: bitwalker/timex
item.description: A complete date/time library for Elixir projects.

item.title: surface-ui/surface
item.description: A server-side rendering component library for Phoenix

item.title: elixir-lang/elixir
item.description: Elixir is a dynamic, functional language designed for building scalable and maintainable applications

item.title: handnot2/samly
item.description: Elixir Plug library to enable SAML 2.0 SP SSO in Phoenix/Plug applications.

item.title: bcdevices/ly10-system-rpi3
item.description: Custom Nerves System for RPI3

item.title: elementary/store
item.description: The elementary OS merch store website

item.title: phoenixframework/phoenix_html
item.description: Phoenix.HTML functions for working with HTML strings and templates

item.title: bitwalker/distillery
item.description: Simplify deployments in Elixir with OTP releases!
